paper_title: Atlas-Chat: Adapting Large Language Models for Low-Resource Moroccan Arabic Dialect
evaluation_method: Multi-task evaluation across Translation, Sentiment Analysis, and Summarization for Moroccan Darija. Accuracy for sentiment classification. BLEU and chrF for translation (character-level n-grams suited for morphologically rich Darija). ROUGE-1/L and BERTScore for summarization. Zero-shot evaluation. Dataset: MBZUAI-Paris/DarijaBench on HuggingFace.
